user.title: Connect to OpenClaw
user.description: Enter your OpenClaw Gateway URL and API token.

data_description.system_prompt: Instructions sent before each conversation (e.g. keep responses short for voice)
data_description.timeout: Set to 0 to disable the response timeout (recommended for long-running requests)
data_description.continue_conversation: Keep the microphone open for follow-up questions after a response
data_description.session_key: Stable key for persistent session context in OpenClaw (default: agent:main:homeassistant)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to OpenClaw Gateway. Check the URL.
error.cannot_reach: Gateway unreachable. Check that Home Assistant can route to the gateway host (network, firewall, Docker bridge, DNS) and that the port is open.
error.timeout: Gateway took too long to respond during validation. Check gateway load or try again.
error.forbidden: Access forbidden by the gateway (403). Check token scopes or gateway auth policy.
error.endpoint_not_found: Endpoint /v1/chat/completions not found (404). Check the base URL — it should be the gateway root (e.g. http://host:18789), not include /v1.
error.endpoint_disabled: Chat Completions endpoint is not enabled on the Gateway.
error.server_error: Gateway returned a server error (5xx). Check the gateway logs.
error.bad_request: Gateway rejected the request (400). Check that the model name and payload are valid — see the Home Assistant logs for the gateway response body.
error.model_not_available: The configured model is not available on this OpenClaw Gateway. Try a model that exists on your gateway (e.g. 'openclaw:main').

data_description.timeout: Set to 0 to disable the response timeout (recommended for long-running requests)
data_description.continue_conversation: Keep the microphone open for follow-up questions after a response
data_description.session_key: Stable key for persistent session context in OpenClaw (default: agent:main:homeassistant)
